allow:
Bash(apache2 -v 2>/dev/null && echo "Apache: OK" || echo "Apache: NOT installed"
mysql --version 2>/dev/null && echo "MySQL: OK" || echo "MySQL: NOT installed"
php -v 2>/dev/null | head -1 && echo "PHP: OK" || echo "PHP: NOT installed"
python3 --version 2>/dev/null && echo "Python3: OK" || echo "Python3: NOT installed")
Bash(systemctl is-active apache2 && systemctl is-active mysql)
Bash(mysql -u root -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1)

Bash(mysql -u lee -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1
mysql -u lee -ples -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1)
Bash(ls /etc/mysql/ 2>/dev/null && cat /etc/mysql/mysql.conf.d/*.cnf 2>/dev/null | head -30)
Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S -p '' mysql -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1)
Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S mysql -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1)
Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S mysql -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS sensor_db CHARACTER SET utf8mb4;" 2>/dev/null && echo "DB created")

Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S mysql sensor_db 2>/dev/null -e "
CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'sensor_user'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'sensor_pass123';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON sensor_db.* TO 'sensor_user'@'localhost';
FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
" && echo "User created"

printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S mysql sensor_db 2>/dev/null -e "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sensor_data \(
    id          INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    sensor_id   VARCHAR\(20\)    NOT NULL,
    sensor_name VARCHAR\(50\)    NOT NULL,
    temperature DECIMAL\(5,2\)   NOT NULL,
    humidity    DECIMAL\(5,2\)   NOT NULL,
    pressure    DECIMAL\(7,2\)   NOT NULL,
    light       INT            NOT NULL,
    status      VARCHAR\(10\)    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OK',
    recorded_at TIMESTAMP      NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    INDEX idx_sensor_id\(sensor_id\),
    INDEX idx_recorded_at\(recorded_at\)
\) ENGINE=InnoDB;
" && echo "Table created")

Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S mysql sensor_db 2>/dev/null -e "
INSERT INTO sensor_data \(sensor_id, sensor_name, temperature, humidity, pressure, light, status\) VALUES
\('SENS-001', 'Room A Sensor',   24.50, 55.30, 1013.25, 350, 'OK'\),
\('SENS-002', 'Room B Sensor',   22.10, 60.00, 1012.80, 200, 'OK'\),
\('SENS-003', 'Outdoor Sensor',  18.75, 72.50, 1010.00, 800, 'OK'\),
\('SENS-004', 'Server Room',     20.00, 40.00, 1011.50, 150, 'OK'\),
\('SENS-005', 'Warehouse',       15.00, 65.00, 1009.00, 500, 'OK'\);
SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total_rows FROM sensor_data;
" && echo "Initial data inserted")

Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/index.php /var/www/html/ 2>/dev/null
printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/monitor.php /var/www/html/ 2>/dev/null
printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/api.php /var/www/html/ 2>/dev/null
printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/style.css /var/www/html/ 2>/dev/null
printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html/ 2>/dev/null
echo "Web files deployed"
ls /var/www/html/)

Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S bash -c 'cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/index.php /var/www/html/ && cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/monitor.php /var/www/html/ && cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/api.php /var/www/html/ && cp /home/lee/Desktop/project2/web/style.css /var/www/html/ && chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html/ && echo OK' 2>/dev/null)
Bash(pip3 install pymysql faker --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(python3 -m pip install pymysql faker --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S bash -c 'apt-get install -y python3-pymysql python3-faker 2>&1 | tail -5' 2>/dev/null)
Bash(printf 'lee\\n' | sudo -S bash -c 'apt-get install -y python3-pymysql python3-pip 2>&1 | tail -3' 2>/dev/null)
Bash(pip3 install faker --break-system-packages 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(python3 -c "import pymysql, faker; print\('pymysql:', pymysql.__version__, '| faker: OK'\)")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost/api.php | head -20)
Bash(curl -s http://localhost/index.php | grep -E "\(total_rows|센서|SENS|recorded_at\)" | head -10)

Bash(git config --global user.name 2>/dev/null
git config --global user.email 2>/dev/null
gh auth status 2>&1 | head -5)

Bash(gh --version 2>/dev/null || echo "gh CLI not installed"
git --version 2>/dev/null)

git init && \\
git config user.name "2101070-LJI" && \\

git add . && \\
git status)
